notes: ADAMTS9: secreted/pericellular metalloprotease; NOT confirmed plasma membrane by HPA; strongest transcriptional signal but better as biomarker than targeting antigen
known_function: ADAMTS9: secreted/pericellular metalloprotease; cleaves versican and aggrecan; remodels perivascular ECM. Strongest transcriptional signal across all 3 primary datasets. Pericellular form associated with cell surface via heparan sulfate proteoglycans.
targeting_notes: Most robust transcriptional signal in this analysis but primarily secreted/pericellular. Better as a biomarker of ischemic EC activation than a targeting antigen. Pericellular form may be partially accessible.

known_function: LITAF (LPS-induced TNF-alpha factor): transmembrane protein; involved in TNF-α secretion and endosomal sorting. Upregulated in all 3 primary datasets. Primarily intracellular/endosomal.
targeting_notes: Primarily endosomal — limited luminal surface accessibility.

known_function: PDLIM1 (CLP36): PDZ and LIM domain protein; actin cytoskeleton; intracellular. Upregulated in all 3 primary datasets.
targeting_notes: Intracellular — not accessible from bloodstream.

notes: Transmembrane protein 252; EC surface; function less characterized
known_function: TMEM252: transmembrane protein 252; poorly characterized; confirmed plasma membrane localization by HPA. Upregulated in all 3 primary datasets.
targeting_notes: Confirmed plasma membrane but function largely unknown. Needs characterization before targeting development.

notes: EC surface-expressed chemotaxis receptor; EC-specific; angiogenesis
known_function: ECSCR (Endothelial Cell Surface Expressed Chemotaxis and Apoptosis Regulator): type I transmembrane protein; enhances VEGFR2/KDR activation and promotes EC migration. Expression is restricted to blood ECs — one of the most EC-specific surface markers known.
targeting_notes: Upregulated in all 3 primary vascular datasets across multiple timepoints. EC-exclusive expression minimizes off-target binding. Filamin A interaction suggests cytoskeletal coupling and internalization potential. No approved targeting ligands yet — requires new antibody/nanobody development.

notes: IFITM1 (CD225); EC surface; interferon-induced; antiviral; upregulated in all 3 datasets
known_function: IFITM1 (CD225): small interferon-induced transmembrane protein; two transmembrane domains with short extracellular loop; antiviral and anti-proliferative functions. Expressed on brain microvascular ECs; upregulated by type I IFN signaling.
targeting_notes: Type I IFN signature confirmed in brain ECs after ischemic stroke (Tuohy 2025). Upregulated in all 3 primary datasets across EC, pericyte, and SMC populations. Small extracellular loop limits antibody epitope accessibility. Pan-vascular marker — not EC-specific.

known_function: RND1: Rho family GTPase; plasma membrane-associated via prenylation; regulates actin cytoskeleton. Upregulated in all 3 primary datasets.
targeting_notes: Plasma membrane-associated but intracellular effector. Limited targeting potential.

known_function: S100A6 (Calcyclin): calcium-binding protein; primarily cytoplasmic; small fraction secreted. Upregulated in ischemic brain across all timepoints in GSE233815. Not EC-specific.
targeting_notes: Primarily intracellular/secreted — not a reliable surface antigen.

known_function: Annexin A2: primarily intracellular calcium-binding protein; small fraction exposed on EC surface as tPA/plasminogen co-receptor. Upregulated in ischemic brain ECs; promotes angiogenesis after stroke.
targeting_notes: Primarily intracellular; surface exposure is context-dependent and limited. Not a reliable surface antigen for nanoparticle targeting.

notes: Moesin; plasma membrane-cytoskeleton linker; EC surface; leukocyte adhesion
known_function: Moesin: ERM family protein; links actin cytoskeleton to plasma membrane; partial surface exposure on activated ECs; mediates leukocyte adhesion. Upregulated in inflammatory conditions.
targeting_notes: Primarily intracellular; limited and context-dependent surface exposure. Not a classical surface antigen.

known_function: RPSA (Laminin receptor): 37/67 kDa laminin receptor; primarily intracellular ribosomal protein; small fraction surface-associated. Upregulated in ischemic ECs.
targeting_notes: Primarily intracellular ribosomal protein — not a reliable surface antigen.

known_function: IFITM2: interferon-induced transmembrane protein 2; small transmembrane protein; antiviral function. Expressed at cell junctions. Upregulated in all 3 primary datasets.
targeting_notes: Small extracellular loop limits antibody accessibility. Pan-vascular marker — not EC-specific.

known_function: PKIG: protein kinase inhibitor gamma; intracellular PKA regulatory subunit. No extracellular domain.
targeting_notes: Intracellular — not accessible from bloodstream.

known_function: EIF5A: eukaryotic translation initiation factor 5A; intracellular translation factor. No extracellular domain.
targeting_notes: Intracellular — not accessible from bloodstream.

notes: ADAMTS4; secreted metalloprotease; ECM remodeling; upregulated 24h post-stroke
known_function: ADAMTS4: secreted metalloprotease; cleaves aggrecan and brevican; ECM remodeling. Upregulated in ischemic ECs at 24h. Pericellular form associated with cell surface.
targeting_notes: Secreted — not a stable membrane surface antigen. Pericellular accessibility possible but unreliable for targeting.

notes: Secreted glycoprotein, promotes angiogenesis via TGFβ/ALK1; upregulated in ischemic ECs
known_function: LRG1 (Leucine-Rich Alpha-2-Glycoprotein 1): secreted glycoprotein; promotes pathological angiogenesis via TGF-β/ALK1 signaling. Upregulated in ischemic brain; circulates in plasma as biomarker after subarachnoid hemorrhage.
targeting_notes: Secreted — not a stable membrane surface antigen. Excellent biomarker of ischemic EC activation. Not suitable as direct targeting antigen.

notes: Atypical chemokine receptor (Duffy antigen); EC surface; chemokine scavenger
known_function: ACKR1 (Duffy/DARC): 7-transmembrane atypical chemokine receptor; scavenges inflammatory chemokines (CXCL1, CXCL5, CCL2). Expressed on postcapillary venular ECs (including brain) and erythrocytes.
targeting_notes: Confirmed surface expression on venular ECs. Human-validated upregulation in stroke infarct (GSE9391, logFC=8.25, p=0.023). Also expressed on erythrocytes — off-target binding risk for IV nanoparticles. Best for venular targeting.

notes: Lipocalin-2; secreted; iron transport; stroke-induced; EC surface receptor (megalin)
known_function: Lipocalin-2 (NGAL): secreted/surface-associated protein; iron transport; acute phase reactant. Upregulated in ischemic brain ECs. Receptor (megalin/LRP2) expressed on brain ECs.
targeting_notes: Primarily secreted — not a stable membrane antigen. Megalin receptor could be targeted instead.

notes: c-Kit (CD117); RTK; EC surface; stem cell factor receptor; upregulated 12-24h
known_function: c-Kit (CD117): type III receptor tyrosine kinase; large extracellular domain; primarily expressed on hematopoietic stem cells and mast cells. Upregulated in ischemic ECs at 12–24h but not brain EC-enriched.
targeting_notes: Poor brain EC specificity — primarily a hematopoietic/mast cell marker. High off-target binding risk.

notes: Apelin; secreted peptide; APJ receptor ligand; angiogenesis; upregulated 24h
known_function: Apelin: secreted peptide; endogenous ligand for APJ receptor; promotes angiogenesis and cardioprotection. Upregulated in ischemic ECs at 24h. APJ receptor (APLNR) could be targeted instead.
targeting_notes: Secreted peptide — not a membrane antigen. APJ receptor (APLNR) is the surface target; apelin itself is not.

known_function: Synaptopodin: actin-associated protein; expressed in ECs and neurons; regulates cytoskeletal dynamics. Upregulated in ischemic ECs.
targeting_notes: Primarily intracellular — not a reliable surface antigen.

notes: uPAR (CD87); GPI-anchored; EC surface; plasminogen activation; stroke-upregulated
known_function: uPAR (CD87): GPI-anchored glycoprotein; three Ly6/uPAR domains; receptor for urokinase plasminogen activator. Coordinates plasminogen activation, ECM remodeling, and leukocyte transmigration. Regulated by TNF-α, IL-1β, and VEGF via endothelial-specific enhancer.
targeting_notes: Confirmed upregulated in ischemic brain ECs (1h–24h). GPI anchor means no intracellular domain — purely a surface docking target. AE105 peptide and anti-uPAR mAbs available. Broad expression on activated monocytes/macrophages limits brain EC specificity; best combined with brain-targeting moiety.

notes: Angiopoietin-2; secreted; Tie2 antagonist; vascular destabilization post-stroke
known_function: Angiopoietin-2: secreted glycoprotein; competitive antagonist of Tie2 receptor; stored in Weibel-Palade bodies. Strongly EC-specific expression. Destabilizes BBB by blocking Tie2 signaling; strongly upregulated in brain ECs after stroke.
targeting_notes: Secreted — not a stable membrane surface antigen. Cannot be directly targeted from bloodstream. However, Tie2 receptor (its target) could be targeted instead. Best used as a biomarker of EC activation.

known_function: ATP8B1: P4-type ATPase; phospholipid flippase; plasma membrane. Expressed in brain ECs and liver. Upregulated in ischemic ECs.
targeting_notes: Plasma membrane but primarily a lipid transporter with intracellular-facing active site. Limited targeting potential.

notes: ADAMTS1; secreted/surface metalloprotease; ECM remodeling; pericyte+EC
known_function: ADAMTS1: secreted metalloprotease; hypoxic early-response gene in ECs (Hatipoglu 2009); cleaves versican and aggrecan. Upregulated in brain after transient MCAO (Cross 2006).
targeting_notes: Secreted — not a stable membrane surface antigen. Confirmed stroke upregulation but poor targeting antigen.

known_function: AKAP12 (Gravin): A-kinase anchoring protein; plasma membrane-associated scaffold; regulates PKA/PKC signaling. Upregulated in ischemic ECs.
targeting_notes: Plasma membrane-associated but primarily intracellular scaffold. Limited targeting potential.

notes: TWEAK receptor (Fn14/CD266); EC surface; TNFR superfamily; NF-κB; stroke-induced
known_function: Fn14 (CD266): small type I transmembrane TNFR-family receptor (129 aa); sole receptor for TWEAK. Expressed at very low levels in normal brain vasculature; strongly induced by ischemia, TNF-α, and VEGF on ECs and neurons.
targeting_notes: Confirmed upregulated in human stroke patients (Inta 2008) and brain ECs during OGD. TWEAK/Fn14 axis drives BBB disruption and NF-κB activation. Anti-Fn14 mAbs and TWEAK-mimetic peptides validated for glioblastoma vessel targeting; receptor-mediated internalization confirmed.

notes: Apolipoprotein L domain-containing 1; EC surface; vascular response to hypoxia
known_function: APOLD1 (Apolipoprotein L Domain Containing 1): endothelial immediate-early gene; transmembrane protein localized to EC contacts and Weibel-Palade bodies. Expression restricted to vasculature across all tissues (Fan 2022). Required for hemostasis and vascular integrity.
targeting_notes: Vascular-restricted expression across tissues makes it highly attractive for EC targeting. Upregulated in pathological angiogenesis and ischemia. APOLD1 loss causes endothelial dysfunction. Direct stroke-specific upregulation confirmed in GSE234052 and GSE223744.

known_function: HMOX1 (HO-1): heme oxygenase-1; primarily intracellular ER/Golgi enzyme; small fraction surface-associated. Strongly upregulated in ischemic brain (log2FC=5.68 at 3D in GSE233815). Cytoprotective.
targeting_notes: Primarily intracellular — not a reliable surface antigen despite strong upregulation.

notes: TSLP receptor; EC surface; cytokine signaling
known_function: CRLF2 (TSLP receptor): cytokine receptor subunit; primarily lymphoid cells. No evidence of brain EC expression.
targeting_notes: Lymphoid cell marker — not suitable for brain EC targeting.

notes: Connexin 43; gap junction; EC/pericyte surface; BBB integrity
known_function: Connexin 43 (Cx43): gap junction protein; extracellular loops at cell-cell contacts; upregulated in brain ECs after stroke. Regulates BBB permeability and EC-pericyte coupling.
targeting_notes: Extracellular loops are at cell-cell junctions, not the luminal surface. Poor accessibility from bloodstream for IV-administered nanoparticles.

known_function: NUS1: dolichol-phosphate mannose synthase subunit; ER membrane protein. Upregulated in ischemic ECs.
targeting_notes: ER-resident — not accessible from bloodstream.

notes: Common gamma chain (CD132); EC surface; cytokine receptor
known_function: Common gamma chain (CD132): cytokine receptor subunit; primarily immune cells (T cells, NK cells). Upregulated in ischemic ECs in transcriptomics but not EC-enriched.
targeting_notes: Primarily immune cell marker — high off-target binding risk.

known_function: UBTD1: ubiquitin domain-containing protein 1; intracellular ubiquitin-related. Upregulated in ischemic ECs.
targeting_notes: Intracellular — not accessible from bloodstream.

known_function: CDC42EP3 (BORG2): CDC42 effector protein; actin cytoskeleton regulation; plasma membrane-associated. Upregulated in ischemic ECs.
targeting_notes: Plasma membrane-associated but primarily intracellular effector. Limited targeting potential.

notes: CD155 (PVR); EC surface; NK/T cell ligand; immune checkpoint
known_function: CD155 (PVR): transmembrane Ig-like adhesion molecule; NK/T cell ligand; immune checkpoint. Broadly expressed including ECs. No brain EC-specific stroke upregulation data.
targeting_notes: Broad expression — not suitable for brain EC-specific targeting.

known_function: Dysferlin: large type II transmembrane protein; membrane repair and vesicle fusion. Expressed in ECs and muscle. Upregulated in ischemic ECs.
targeting_notes: Confirmed plasma membrane but primarily a muscle protein. Limited brain EC specificity.

known_function: BCR (Breakpoint Cluster Region): primarily known as BCR-ABL fusion in CML; also a Rho GTPase-activating protein. Upregulated in ischemic ECs. Not EC-specific.
targeting_notes: Not EC-specific; primarily known as oncogene fusion partner.

notes: Semaphorin 6D; transmembrane; axon guidance/vascular remodeling
known_function: Semaphorin 6D: class 6 transmembrane semaphorin; large extracellular Sema domain; signals via PlexinA1/A4. Expressed on ECs and neurons; regulates vascular patterning and angiogenesis. Family members regulate post-stroke angiogenesis.
targeting_notes: Transmembrane with large accessible extracellular Sema domain. Upregulated in stroke transcriptomics (GSE234052, GSE225948). Roles in intracerebral hemorrhage recovery reported. Limited direct brain EC stroke data; needs validation.

known_function: IFRD1 (TIS7): interferon-related developmental regulator 1; transmembrane protein; transcriptional co-repressor. Upregulated in ischemic ECs.
targeting_notes: Confirmed plasma membrane but broad expression. Limited targeting specificity.

known_function: GAPDH: glycolytic enzyme; housekeeping gene; intracellular. Upregulation in transcriptomics likely reflects metabolic stress.
targeting_notes: Housekeeping gene — not a targeting antigen.

known_function: RELL1 (RELT-like 1): TNFR family member; activates p38 and apoptosis; expressed in lymphoid tissues and brain. No specific brain EC enrichment.
targeting_notes: No brain EC specificity or stroke data.

known_function: SOCS3: suppressor of cytokine signaling 3; intracellular JAK-STAT inhibitor; upregulated in ischemic brain. No extracellular domain.
targeting_notes: Intracellular — not accessible from bloodstream.

known_function: Transglutaminase 2: primarily intracellular enzyme; small fraction secreted or surface-associated. Upregulated in ischemic brain. Not EC-specific.
targeting_notes: Primarily intracellular; not a reliable surface antigen.

known_function: C1QBP (p32): complement C1q binding protein; primarily mitochondrial/intracellular; small fraction surface-associated. Upregulated in ischemic ECs.
targeting_notes: Primarily intracellular — not a reliable surface antigen.

notes: CD93; EC surface glycoprotein; angiogenesis; complement receptor
known_function: CD93 (C1qRp/AA4.1): single-pass type I transmembrane glycoprotein; large extracellular domain with EGF-like and mucin-like regions. Strongly EC-enriched; regulates VE-cadherin stability, β1-integrin signaling, and angiogenesis via Multimerin-2.
targeting_notes: Confirmed upregulated in brain ECs after focal cerebral ischemia (Harhausen 2010). Anti-CD93 mAbs and nanobodies developed for tumor angiogenesis targeting. Receptor is internalized via Rab5c endosomes — enables transcytosis-based BBB delivery. Large ECD ideal for antibody conjugation.

known_function: Tribbles 1: pseudokinase; primarily intracellular; regulates MAPK signaling. Upregulated in ischemic ECs.
targeting_notes: Primarily intracellular — not a reliable surface antigen.

known_function: Filamin A: large actin-binding protein; primarily intracellular cytoskeletal; small fraction surface-associated. Upregulated in ischemic ECs.
targeting_notes: Primarily intracellular — not a reliable surface antigen.

known_function: Adenylyl cyclase 4: transmembrane enzyme; cAMP production; expressed in brain ECs. Upregulated in ischemic ECs. Intracellular catalytic domain.
targeting_notes: Transmembrane but catalytic domain is intracellular. Extracellular loops are small. Not ideal for antibody targeting.

known_function: Myosin IIA heavy chain: cytoskeletal motor protein; primarily intracellular; small fraction surface-associated. Upregulated in ischemic ECs.
targeting_notes: Primarily intracellular cytoskeletal protein — not a reliable surface antigen.

known_function: Myosin IC: unconventional myosin; primarily intracellular; links plasma membrane to actin. Upregulated in ischemic ECs.
targeting_notes: Primarily intracellular — not a reliable surface antigen.

known_function: SNAT2: sodium-coupled neutral amino acid transporter; expressed in brain capillary ECs; also ubiquitously expressed. Upregulated by hyperosmotic stress.
targeting_notes: Ubiquitously expressed — not brain EC-specific. Small extracellular loops.

known_function: RhoJ: endothelium-enriched intracellular Rho GTPase; regulates EC migration, angiogenesis, and focal adhesion dynamics. No extracellular domain.
targeting_notes: Intracellular — not accessible from bloodstream despite high EC enrichment.

known_function: PTPN12 (PTP-PEST): intracellular tyrosine phosphatase; regulates focal adhesions. Upregulated in ischemic ECs.
targeting_notes: Intracellular phosphatase — not accessible from bloodstream.

known_function: Stabilin-1: large transmembrane scavenger receptor; primarily expressed on liver sinusoidal ECs and macrophages. Limited brain EC expression.
targeting_notes: Wrong tissue distribution — liver sinusoidal EC and macrophage marker. Not suitable for brain EC targeting.

known_function: FKBP2 (FKBP13): ER-resident peptidyl-prolyl isomerase; ER lumen-facing. Upregulated in ischemic ECs.
targeting_notes: ER-resident — not accessible from bloodstream.

known_function: SNRK (Sucrose Nonfermenting 1-Related Kinase): intracellular AMPK-family kinase; promotes angiogenesis in ECs. No extracellular domain.
targeting_notes: Intracellular kinase — not accessible from bloodstream.

known_function: EHD4: EH domain-containing endosomal recycling protein; intracellular vesicle trafficking. No extracellular domain.
targeting_notes: Intracellular — not accessible from bloodstream.

known_function: CAVIN3 (PRKCDBP): caveolae-associated protein; involved in pathological angiogenesis. Associated with plasma membrane via caveolae but not a classical surface antigen.
targeting_notes: Caveolae-associated — not accessible from bloodstream as a targeting antigen.

known_function: YBX1 (Y-box binding protein 1): primarily nuclear/cytoplasmic RNA-binding protein; small fraction secreted. Upregulated in ischemic brain.
targeting_notes: Primarily intracellular — not a reliable surface antigen.

known_function: EIF5: eukaryotic translation initiation factor 5; intracellular translation factor. Housekeeping function.
targeting_notes: Intracellular — not accessible from bloodstream.

known_function: RPL36AL: ribosomal protein L36a-like; intracellular ribosomal component. Housekeeping function.
targeting_notes: Intracellular — not accessible from bloodstream.

known_function: Na/K-ATPase β3 subunit: expressed in brain microvascular ECs; also in other tissues. Na/K-ATPase disrupted in ischemic stroke.
targeting_notes: Not brain EC-specific; small extracellular domain.

known_function: BAX: pro-apoptotic BCL-2 family member; intracellular mitochondrial protein. Upregulation reflects apoptotic signaling in ischemia.
targeting_notes: Intracellular — not accessible from bloodstream.

known_function: CCT3: chaperonin containing TCP1 subunit 3; intracellular protein folding complex. Housekeeping function.
targeting_notes: Intracellular — not accessible from bloodstream.

known_function: Myosin IB: unconventional myosin; primarily intracellular; membrane-cytoskeleton linker. Upregulated in ischemic ECs.
targeting_notes: Primarily intracellular — not a reliable surface antigen.

known_function: HSP90β: heat shock protein 90β; primarily intracellular chaperone; small fraction surface-associated. Upregulated in ischemic ECs.
targeting_notes: Primarily intracellular — not a reliable surface antigen.

known_function: CHIC2: cysteine-rich hydrophobic domain protein; intracellular vesicle transport. No extracellular domain.
targeting_notes: Intracellular — not accessible from bloodstream.

known_function: PSMC5: proteasome 26S subunit; intracellular protein degradation. Housekeeping function.
targeting_notes: Intracellular — not accessible from bloodstream.

known_function: STIP1 (STI1/HOP): stress-induced phosphoprotein 1; intracellular HSP70/HSP90 co-chaperone. Small fraction secreted.
targeting_notes: Primarily intracellular — not a reliable surface antigen.

known_function: CDV3: carnitine deficiency-associated gene; intracellular function. Limited characterization.
targeting_notes: Intracellular — not accessible from bloodstream.

notes: G-CSF; secreted; EC-derived; neuroprotection; stroke response
known_function: G-CSF (CSF3): secreted cytokine; neuroprotective in stroke; mobilizes hematopoietic stem cells. Downregulated in human stroke infarct (GSE9391). EC-derived but primarily a circulating cytokine.
targeting_notes: Secreted — not a membrane antigen.

notes: 4-1BB (CD137); TNFR superfamily; EC surface; T cell costimulation
known_function: 4-1BB (CD137): TNFR-family surface glycoprotein; primarily on activated immune cells (T cells, NK cells). Expressed on activated ECs but not brain EC-enriched.
targeting_notes: Primarily immune cell marker — high off-target binding risk.

notes: E-selectin (CD62E); canonical EC activation marker; leukocyte adhesion
known_function: E-selectin (CD62E): type I transmembrane glycoprotein; lectin + EGF + 6 CCP domains; mediates leukocyte rolling via PSGL-1. Expressed exclusively on activated ECs; absent from resting endothelium.
targeting_notes: Gold-standard stroke EC target. Confirmed upregulation 6–12h post-stroke in brain ECs. ES-bp peptide and anti-SELE mAbs validated for nanoparticle targeting in stroke models. Large extracellular domain fully accessible from bloodstream.

notes: CD73; ecto-5-nucleotidase; EC surface; adenosine production; BBB regulation
known_function: CD73 (ecto-5'-nucleotidase): GPI-anchored surface enzyme; converts AMP to adenosine; regulates vascular tone and BBB permeability. Expressed on brain ECs, glial cells, and leukocytes. Protective in stroke — CD73-KO mice have larger infarcts.
targeting_notes: Hypoxia-responsive upregulation in brain microvascular ECs. GPI-anchored — fully accessible from bloodstream. Not brain EC-specific. Anti-CD73 mAbs in clinical development for cancer immunotherapy (oleclumab). Adenosine production role may complicate targeting strategy.

notes: MCP-1; secreted chemokine; EC-derived; monocyte recruitment
known_function: MCP-1 (CCL2): secreted chemokine; recruits monocytes/macrophages; strongly upregulated in ischemic brain. EC-derived but also produced by astrocytes, microglia, and neurons.
targeting_notes: Secreted chemokine — not a membrane antigen. Biomarker of neuroinflammation.

notes: Interleukin-6; secreted; pleiotropic cytokine; stroke response
known_function: Interleukin-6: pleiotropic secreted cytokine; acute phase response; upregulated in ischemic brain. Produced by ECs, astrocytes, microglia, and neurons.
targeting_notes: Secreted — not a membrane antigen. Biomarker of neuroinflammation.

notes: CD44; EC/SMC surface; hyaluronan receptor; inflammation
known_function: CD44: hyaluronan receptor; type I transmembrane glycoprotein; expressed on ECs, immune cells, and many other cell types. Upregulated in SMCs and whole-brain after stroke.
targeting_notes: Ubiquitously expressed — not suitable for brain EC-specific targeting.
